title: gfx90a versus gfx942 CDNA Split Lab

problem.summary: Separate CDNA2 gfx90a assumptions from CDNA3 gfx942 behavior for MFMA, LDS, cache, and library tactic comparisons.
inputs: same task built for gfx90a and gfx942
constraints: Template-only; do not generalize one CDNA generation to the other without measurements
Record exact GPU model, gfx target, clocks, and arch flags
Compare same code path and shape suite where possible

verification.method: Attach this workflow to a task-specific correctness harness or compile/profile artifact before claiming evidence.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as wave 2 and cleaned in the second parity pass. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
